description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of ethnic or western wear and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.UpperLeather upper with a peep toe Slip on style for ease of wearLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole grooved on the forefoot and heel patch for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
